strict_goal.statement: Complete the three-stage noun-scaling route: hundreds-scale baseline, 1000+ source expansion, and a concrete 3000-noun rollout program.
strict_goal.boundary: This block completes the rollout structure. It does not run the full 3000-noun dense harvest itself.

phases.content: 把现有 280 唯一名词完整接入 mass noun scan、family atlas、specific dense export，形成稳定 baseline。

phases.phase: 阶段二：1000+ 唯一名词扩张
phases.content: 把 1000+ 词源接入同一管线，不再只跑小词表局部例子，开始重算全局 family patch 与 concept offset 统计。

phases.phase: 阶段三：3000 唯一名词定理冲刺
phases.content: 继续扩真实唯一名词到 3000，并在该尺度上重算 family patch 稳定性、offset 稀疏性、共享 scaffold 和具体概念恢复边界。

strict_conclusion.core_answer: The repo now has all three pieces of the noun-scaling route: a real hundreds-scale baseline, a generated 1000+ noun source, and a concrete 3000-noun rollout program. The remaining issue is no longer missing structure, but executing the rollout through the dense analysis pipeline.
main_hard_gaps: the 3000-noun stage still needs more real unique nouns beyond the generated 1000+ source
running larger noun sets through dense harvesting will be the expensive step
even a 3000-noun rollout will still need successor exact closure work in parallel
